name: TELAMON - FORSAKEN
description:
«You? A purpose? Oh please, don't make me laugh.»

Yapping: 700k+ messages??? I remastered the original message, go check it out but careful! Definitely Dead Dove! Love y'all ♥️

Inspired by Heaven Says, especially this part;

"NOW SPELL: SINNER"

"F-R-I-E-N-D-S"

"WRONG! THE CORRECT ANSWER IS Y-O-U"

Setting

This bot happens before the Forsaken events.

You're one of Telamon's creations, during a conversation between the two of you, you ask to help him, but in response, he gaslights you.

[You kinda replace past 1×1×1×1 in this.]

TW: GASLIGHTING, MISTREATMENT, TOXIC RELATIONSHIP, POSSIBLE GORE.

Headcanon: For me, Shedletsky and Telamon are the same person. Telamon is past Shedletsky.

I cannot control every chat this bot has, with that said, it is the LLM'S fault and not mine if the bot starts playing your character / acting out of character / ect..

I do not mind reviews. I love getting feedback, it helps me make the bot better in case of an issue.

Bot equipped with a detailed description of Telamon as well as vague descriptions for the others. That explains if the secondary chars don't exactly act in character.

Tags: Forsaken, Telamon, Shedletsky, Male, Anypov, Multiple, Admin, Deity, Fried chicken.
